description_long: This factory building complex is situated at the center of a city block, surrounded by a variety of mid-rise commercial and office buildings. The factory itself features a large, rectangular footprint with multiple wings and a central courtyard area, which is landscaped with trees and pathways. The exterior walls are primarily constructed from brick and concrete, with large industrial-style windows lining the facades. The roof is flat and appears to have some mechanical installations, such as vents or HVAC units. The surrounding buildings are of varying heights and styles, creating a dense urban environment typical of an industrial district.
description: A large, rectangular factory building with brick and concrete facades, industrial windows, and a landscaped central courtyard, surrounded by mid-rise urban buildings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance of the factory building, flanked by several mid-rise office buildings and a clear view of the central courtyard.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of the factory building, the landscaped courtyard, and the alignment of adjacent commercial structures.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals additional industrial windows, rooftop machinery, and the symmetrical layout of the surrounding urban block.
description_view_3: This opposite side view emphasizes the factory's rectangular shape, the green courtyard, and the proximity of neighboring buildings.
